subtopics.title: What is a Computer?
common_misconceptions: A computer is just the monitor
Computers are too difficult to learn
subtopics.teaching_note: Computer: electronic device that accepts data, processes it according to instructions, and produces information. Parts: Monitor (display), System unit (CPU), Keyboard (input), Mouse (input). How it works: Input → Processing → Output → Storage. Types: Desktop, Laptop, Tablet. Uses: education, business, communication, entertainment, research. Nigerian context: ICT in schools, N-Power Tech, computer villages (Ikeja, Port Harcourt), mobile phone penetration.
